mapper.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM video_likes vl JOIN videos v ON vl.video_id = v.id WHERE v.user_id = #{userId} AND v.deleted_yn = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_bookmarks WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND video_id = #{videoId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO video_bookmarks (id, user_id, video_id, created_at) VALUES (video_bookmarks_seq.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{videoId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM video_bookmarks WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND video_id = #{videoId}
mapper.select: SELECT v.id, v.user_id as userId, v.title, v.description, v.video_url as videoUrl, v.thumbnail_url as thumbnailUrl, v.view_count as viewCount, u.username as writerName FROM videos v JOIN video_bookmarks vb ON v.id = vb.video_id JOIN users u ON v.user_id = u.id WHERE vb.user_id = #{userId} AND v.deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY vb.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follows (id, follower_id, following_id, created_at) VALUES (follows_seq.NEXTVAL, #{followerId}, #{followingId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{followerId} AND following_id = #{followingId}
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM follows WHERE following_id = #{userId}
SELECT NVL(COUNT(*), 0) FROM follows WHERE follower_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND video_id = #{videoId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO video_likes (id, user_id, video_id, created_at) VALUES (video_likes_seq.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{videoId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM video_likes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND video_id = #{videoId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM video_likes WHERE video_id = #{videoId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO video_comments (id, user_id, video_id, content, created_at) VALUES (video_comments_seq.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{videoId}, #{content}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.user_id as userId, c.video_id as videoId, c.content, c.created_at as createdAt, u.username FROM video_comments c JOIN users u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.video_id = #{videoId} AND c.deleted_yn = 'N' ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
